entry.title: thank you rubee and tom for having me and making me feel so welcome even though i developed several enemies whilst at the weddong

entry.title: no pizza guys were harmed in the making of this video. sorry pizza guy it’s not your fault. its not mine either. its a third thing

entry.title: SORRY I FILMED A VIDEO TODAY BUT I RAN OUT OF TIME TO EDIT IT SO I MADE THIS instead I GOT THIS BEAr TODAY WHY IS IT SO MASSIVE

entry.title: Replying to @Tomo 5222 they got take away (which is cheaper) but then sat down with it is the gist. several morals here: 1. always be kind to people just doing their jobs 2. you never know who youre sat next to it might just be zoë bread pretending to fi
